title: Thread Manifest
description: Output of Stage 1 Thread Discovery. Maps application thread types to scheduling roles for BPF scheduler generation.

source_path.description: Path to the application source code that was analyzed

language.description: Primary programming language of the application

identification_method.description: How threads are identified at runtime

default_role.description: Role for threads not matching any pattern (typically 'foreground')

rationale.description: Why these threads have different latency requirements and how deprioritizing background threads will reduce tail latency

threads.description: List of discovered thread types with their roles

role.description: Scheduling role: foreground threads get priority, background threads are deprioritized

purpose.description: What this thread does in the application

type.description: Method used to identify this thread at runtime

comm_prefix.description: Fixed prefix bytes to match against task->comm (for comm_prefix/comm_exact types)

comm_length.description: Number of bytes to compare in the comm field

function_symbol.description: Function symbol name for uprobe-based identification

library_path.description: Path to binary or shared library containing the function symbol
